response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct musical performances by Oozora Subaru.
2. Song 1 (00:00.000 - 01:50.000): 'Starlight' by Oozora Subaru. Lyrics found and verified on UtaTen.
3. Song 2 (01:50.000 - 04:59.000): 'Love Me!' by Oozora Subaru. Lyrics found and verified on UtaTen.
4. Constructed JSON with scene breakdown and lyrics for both songs.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by Hololive VTuber Oozora Subaru, consisting of two original songs: 'Starlight' (00:00.000 - 01:50.000) and 'Love Me!' (01:50.000 - end). Oozora Subaru performs both songs.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs her original song 'Starlight' on a stage with a digital star background. She sings and dances throughout the scene. The song title 'スターライト' is visible in the top left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
描いた未知のキャンバス
重ねる景色 繋いでみて
繰り返していく衝動
揺らいだ目の前に広がる世界
星屑のメロディ歌に乗せた
クラッと鮮やかに眩ませるように
駆け抜けるよスターライト
We can fly そう僕らは
いつしか夢の中引かれて
ただがむしゃらに走り続けたよ
無限の宇宙に響いたキミを照らす声は
どこへだってきらり飛んでゆけるんだ
愉快な仲間と歩いた非日常
掴んでみて指先の一等星
滲んでゆく目の前に広がった限界は
皆の手重ねてぶっ壊して
吸い込まれそうな夜空を見上げて
今叫ぶよスターライト
I wanna be そう僕らは
いつでも側で笑い合って
あふれる声が遠くこだまする
願いのかけらを灯したキミの腕を引いて
どこへだってきらり飛んでゆけるんだ
ちょこっと不安な日も
魔法をかけてハッピー
百人力で乗り越えていこう
アクアブルーに染まる
大空にめがけた
鼓動が弾んでく
We can fly そう僕らは
この日をずっと待ってたんだ
まだ醒めないでStarlight
僕らは止まらない
その光が消える1秒前まで
走り続けるよ

強く抱いてきらり輝いてゆけ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Painted unknown canvas
Layering scenery, let's try connecting them
Repeated impulses
In front of my wavering eyes, the world spreads out
I put the melody of stardust into my singing
Like dazzling, to make me dizzy
I'll dash through, Starlight
We can fly, that's right, us
At some point, pulled into the middle of a dream
We kept running recklessly
The voice echoing in the infinite universe and illuminating you
Can fly anywhere, sparkling
Daily life walked with fun companions
Let's try grabbing it, the star of the first magnitude on my fingertips
In front of my blurred eyes, the limit that spread out
Everyone's hands stacked together, let's break it
Looking up at the night sky that seems to suck me in
I'll shout now, Starlight
I wanna be, that's right, us
Always laughing together by my side
Overflowing voices echo in the distance
Pulling the arm of you who lit up the fragments of wishes
Can fly anywhere, sparkling
Even on days when I'm a little anxious
I'll cast a spell and be happy
Let's overcome it with a hundred-man power
Targeting the blue-dyed sky
The heartbeat keeps bouncing
We can fly, that's right, us
We've been waiting for this day forever
Don't wake up yet, Starlight
We won't stop
We'll keep running until 1 second before the light disappears
Clutching the voice echoing in the infinite universe and illuminating you
Shine and go, sparkling
